{{Missing Info|specifics=Enemies, ride lvl events, pumpkin gift box confirmation}}

==Fantasy Tour==
[[File:Fantasy Tour.png|300px|left]]
Oct. 27 - Nov. 09 2023

===Scarecrow Shop===
Spend Joy Coins to buy event items! At the end of the event, the remaining coins will be automatically converted into B-tads!<br>Joy Coin Sources: Pass the rides, Claim Joy Point Rewards, Claim Rainbow Point Rewards.
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Item
!Price
!Purchase Limit
|-
|Happy Train Capsule(Rocket Robot)
|15K
|1
|-
|[[Medium Rune]] Frag +40
|15K
|1
|-
|[[Gear|Eye of Horus]]
|15K
|1
|-
|[[Altar|Dragon Orb]]
|2,500
|3
|-
|Lottery Ticket +5
|800
|3
|-
|Offering Speedup +8h
|500
|3
|-
|Refine Speedup +8h
|500
|3
|-
|Gene Speedup +8h
|500
|3
|-
|Clone Speedup +8h
|500
|3
|-
|Divine Order Chest +100
|800
|3
|-
|Divine Neutral Chest +100
|800
|3
|-
|Divine Chaos Chest +100
|800
|3
|-
|Master Alchemy Case +3
|800
|3
|-
|Coating Bucket +3
|800
|3
|-
|Research Briefcase
|1,000
|3
|-
|Toner +20
|200
|3
|-
|Glue +30
|200
|3
|-
|Quantum Gel +600
|200
|3
|-
|B-tads +6,000
|100
|Infinite
|}

===Shopping Center===
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Cost
!Rewards
!Limit
|-
|1,000 W-tads
|Offering Speedup +10h, Glue +50, Joy Dice +10
|1
|-
|2,000 W-tads
|Lottery Ticket +8, Wish Coin +3, Joy Dice +20
|1
|-
|US$4.99, AUD 7.99
|Star Stone +2, Lottery Ticket +3, Rainbow Point +10, W-tad +300
|3
|-
|US$14.99; AUD 22.99
|Dragon Orb, Wish Coin +7, Rainbow Point +20, W-tad +1,000
|3
|-
|US$29.99; AUD 49.99
|Incense +3. Lottery Ticket +25, Rainbow Point +30, W-tad +2,000
|3
|-
|US$69.99; AUD 99.99
|Offering Speedup +3d, Star Stone +25, Rainbow Point +40, W-tad +5,000
|3
|-
|US$99.99; AUD 149.99
|Grandmaster Scroll +40, Lottery Ticket +60, Rainbow Point +50, W-tad +8,000
|5
|-
|US$99.99; AUD 149.99
|Badge +70, Lottery Ticket +60, Rainbow Point +50, W-tad +8,000
|5
|}

===Witch's Treasure===
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Item
!Price
|-
|8,000 W-tads
|Rainbow Point +40, [[Medium Rune]] Frag +40, Star Stone +10, Joy Dice +40
|-
|Any Purchase
|Orochi-chan([[Snail Avatar|Avatar]]), Joy Dice +15, W-tad +600
|-
|$49.99; AUD 79.99
|[[Medium Rune]] Frag +40, [[Gear|Eye of Horus]], Lottery Ticket +40, Rainbow Point +50, W-tad +4,000
|}
{{clear}}

==Crazy Halloween==
[[File:Crazy Halloween.png|300px|left]]
Roll the Joy Dice and explore the park! Each time you pass a ride, it levels up and gives you rewards!<br>After Lap 3, Tile 40, Roll All is unlocked, which completes one lap around the park using as many Joy Dice as needed.<br>Lap 4 unlocks Park Admin and Management Rewards.

===Amusement Park Rides===
At certain levels, rides will have mini-events with rewards!<br>Passing each ride will give W-tads, B-tads, and Joy Coins
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Ride
!Level
!Rewards
|-
|Sky Cinema
|Lvl 3
|Sadako joins the party
|-
|Opera House
|Lvl 5
|Leeku joins the party
|-
|Brave Slide
|Lvl 7
|Peacekeeper joins the party
|-
|Ghoulwood
|Lvl 9
|W-tad +200
|-
|Star Kingdom
|Lvl 9
|Unlocks Trick or Thump
|-
|Crazy Roller Coaster
|Lvl 11
|W-tads +200
|-
|Pendulum Ride
|Lvl 12
|W-tad +200
|-
|Pumpkin House
|Lvl 15
|Joy Dice +5
|-
|Pumpkin Coach
|Lvl 17
|Joy Dice +10
|-
|Star Kingdom
|Lvl 19
|Joy Dice +15
|}

===Point Gift===
Progress in the event to get rewards!

====Joy Point====
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Rolls
!Rewards
|-
|5
|Joy Coin +200, Offering Speedup +2h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|10
|Joy Coin +200, Offering Speedup +2h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|15
|Rainbow Point +10, Offering Speedup +2h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|20
|Joy Coin +200, Offering Speedup +2h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|30
|Joy Coin +200, Offering Speedup +2h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|40
|Rainbow Point +10, Offering Speedup +2h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|50
|Joy Coin +200, Offering Speedup +2h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|60
|Joy Coin +200, Offering Speedup +2h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|70
|Rainbow Point +10, Offering Speedup +2h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|80
|Joy Coin +300, Offering Speedup +3h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|90
|Joy Coin +300, Offering Speedup +3h, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|100
|Rainbow Point +20, Offering Speedup +3h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|120
|Joy Coin +300, Offering Speedup +3h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|140
|Joy Coin +300, Offering Speedup +3h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|160
|Rainbow Point +20, Offering Speedup +3h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|180
|Joy Coin +300, Offering Speedup +3h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|200
|Joy Coin +300, Offering Speedup +3h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|220
|W-tad +300, Offering Speedup +3h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|240
|Joy Coin +500, Offering Speedup +4h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|260
|Joy Coin +500, Offering Speedup +4h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|280
|W-tad +500, Offering Speedup +4h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|300
|Joy Coin +500, Offering Speedup +4h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|320
|Joy Coin +500, Offering Speedup +4h, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|350
|W-tad +500, Offering Speedup +4h, Lottery Ticket +3
|}

====Rainbow Point====
Purchase packs and collect Joy Point rewards to get Rainbow Points.
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Points
!Rewards
|-
|10
|Lottery Ticket +3, Joy Coin +300, Joy Dice +5
|-
|20
|Lottery Ticket +3, Joy Coin +300, Joy Dice +5
|-
|30
|Lottery Ticket +3, Joy Coin +300, Badge +10
|-
|40
|Lottery Ticket +3, Joy Coin +300, Joy Dice +5
|-
|50
|Lottery Ticket +3, Joy Coin +300, Joy Dice +5
|-
|60
|Lottery Ticket +3, Joy Coin +300, Star Stone +3
|-
|70
|Lottery Ticket +4, Joy Coin +500, Joy Dice +6
|-
|80
|Lottery Ticket +4, Joy Coin +500, Joy Dice +6
|-
|90
|Lottery Ticket +4, Joy Coin +500, [[Amusement Park Master]]
|-
|100
|Lottery Ticket +4, Joy Coin +500, Joy Dice +6
|-
|110
|Lottery Ticket +4, Joy Coin +500, Joy Dice +6
|-
|120
|Lottery Ticket +4, Joy Coin +500, [[Witch's Pot]]
|-
|140
|Lottery Ticket +6, Joy Coin +800, Joy Dice +8
|-
|160
|Lottery Ticket +6, Joy Coin +800, Joy Dice +8
|-
|180
|Lottery Ticket +6, Joy Coin +800, [[Gear|Eye of Horus]]
|-
|200
|Lottery Ticket +6, Joy Coin +800, Joy Dice +8
|-
|220
|Lottery Ticket +6, Joy Coin +800, Joy Dice +8
|-
|240
|Lottery Ticket +6, Joy Coin +800, [[Medium Rune]] Frag +40
|-
|270
|Lottery Ticket +8, Joy Coin +1,200, Joy Dice +10
|-
|300
|Lottery Ticket +8, Joy Coin +1,200, Joy Dice +10
|-
|330
|Lottery Ticket +8, Joy Coin +1,200, Singularity Crystal +2
|-
|360
|Lottery Ticket +8, Joy Coin +1,200, Joy Dice +10
|-
|390
|Lottery Ticket +8, Joy Coin +1,200, Joy Dice +10
|-
|420
|Lottery Ticket +8, Joy Coin +1,200, [[Medium Rune]] Frag +40
|-
|450
|Lottery Ticket +10, Joy Coin +1,600, Joy Dice +12
|-
|480
|Lottery Ticket +10, Joy Coin +1,600, Joy Dice +12
|-
|510
|Lottery Ticket +10, Joy Coin +1,600, The Tin Man (Rocket Robot)
|-
|540
|Lottery Ticket +10, Joy Coin +1,600, Joy Dice +12
|-
|570
|Lottery Ticket +10, Joy Coin +1,600, Joy Dice +12
|-
|600
|Lottery Ticket +10, Joy Coin +1,600, [[Gear|Crystal of Will]]
|-
|640
|Lottery Ticket +12, Joy Coin +2,000, Joy Dice +15
|-
|680
|Lottery Ticket +12, Joy Coin +2,000, Joy Dice +15
|-
|720
|Lottery Ticket +12, Joy Coin +2,000, [[Medium Rune]] Frag +40
|-
|760
|Lottery Ticket +12, Joy Coin +2,000, Joy Dice +15
|-
|800
|Lottery Ticket +12, Joy Coin +2,000, Joy Dice +15
|-
|840
|Lottery Ticket +12, Joy Coin +2,000, Pumpkin Hut (Decoration)
|-
|880
|Lottery Ticket +15, Joy Coin +2,500, Joy Dice +20
|-
|920
|Lottery Ticket +15, Joy Coin +2,500, Joy Dice +20
|-
|960
|Lottery Ticket +15, Joy Coin +2,500, [[Happy Gravitron]]
|}

===Management Rewards===
1 level of ride = 1 management point!<br>Manager is free, Master Manager is US$14.99; AUD 22.99
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Level
!Manager
!Master Manager
|-
|30
|Novice Scroll +10
|[[VIP Wristband]], Organ Chest +100
|-
|35
|Joy Coin +200
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|40
|Joy Coin +200
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|45
|Joy Coin +200
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|50
|Offering Speedup +10h
|Incense, Organ Chest +100
|-
|55
|Joy Coin +200
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|60
|Joy Coin +200
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|65
|Joy Coin +200
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|70
|Lottery Ticket +2
|Dragon Orb, Organ Chest +100
|-
|75
|Joyful Pack
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|80
|Joyful Pack
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|85
|Joyful Pack
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|90
|Expert Alchemy Case
|Master Alchemy Case +3, Organ Chest +100
|-
|95
|Joyful Pack
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|100
|Joyful Pack
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|105
|Joyful Pack
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|110
|Purple Fungus Choice Pack +2
|Orange Fungus Choice Pack +5, Organ Chest +100
|-
|115
|Joyful Pack
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|120
|Joyful Pack
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|125
|Joyful Pack
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|130
|Badge +10
|Badge +20, Organ Chest +100
|-
|135
|Joyful Pack
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|140
|Joyful Pack
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|145
|Joyful Pack
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|150
|Expert Scroll +20
|Relic RF +15, Organ Chest +100
|-
|155
|Joyful Pack +2
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|160
|Joyful Pack +2
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|165
|Joyful Pack +2
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|170
|Singularity Crystal
|Singularity Crystal +2, Organ Chest +100
|}
Joyful Pack contains: Pumpkin Candy +20, Magic Potion +50, Joy Coin +200
{{clear}}

==Trick or Thump==
[[File:Trick or Thump.png|300px|left]]
Once the Star Kingdom ride reaches level 9, you can fight with your party members to defeat enemies and earn rewards!<br>Party members can be upgraded with Pumpkin Candy from Management Rewards

{|class="wikitable
!colspan=2|Party Members
|-
!Name
!Special Skill
|-
|Prince Nerd's Soul
|Patrol Squad DMG +%
|-
|Sadako
|Patrol Squad Fire DMG +
|-
|Leeku
|Patrol Squad Wind DMG +
|-
|Peacekeeper
|Patrol Squad DMG REDUC +%
|}

{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!colspan=2|Enemies
|-
!Name
!Rewards
|-
|Tricky Blank Swan
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Harevalor
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Kitty
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Seal
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Mammoth
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Beta
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Ninja
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Warrior
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Lion
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Panda
|Pumpkin Voucher +2, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Fisherman
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Zombie
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Ghost
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Paint
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Dog
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Penguin
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Kangaroo
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Rabbit
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Miner
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|-
|Tricky Witch
|Pumpkin Voucher +3, W-tad +100
|}
{{clear}}

===Pumpkin Gift Box===
#Consume 1 Pumpkin Voucher to open the Gift Box once.
#Defeat Gremlin or buy Pack to get vouchers.
#Gift Box rewards will be refreshed once all of them are claimed.
#The gift Box can be refreshed 4 times, with 4 new rewards each time.
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Price
!Reward
!Limit
|-
|300 W-tads
|Pumpkin Voucher +1
|26
|-
|US$4.99; AUD 7.99
|Pumpkin Voucher +9, W-tad +300
|4
|}
{|class="wikitable |text-align: center
!'''Round 1'''
!'''Round 2'''
!'''Round 3'''
!'''Round 4'''
|-
|[[File:Pumpkin Gift Box 1.jpeg|250px]]
|[[File:Pumpkin Gift Box 2.jpeg|250px]]
|[[File:Pumpkin Gift Box 3.jpeg|250px]]
|[[File:Pumpkin Gift Box 4.jpeg|250px]]
|-
!colspan=4|'''Top Left'''
|-
|Master Alchemy Case +3
|Lucky Coin +5
|Dragon Orb
|[[Witch's Sugar Jar]]
|-
!colspan=4|'''Top Right'''
|-
|Star Stone +3
|Incense
|Grandmaster Scroll +40
|Singularity Crystal
|-
!colspan=4|'''Bottom Left'''
|-
|Tricky Rabbit ([[Snail Avatar|Avatar]])
|Tricky Seal ([[Snail Avatar|Avatar]])
|Tricky Dog ([[Snail Avatar|Avatar]])
|Tricky Witch ([[Snail Avatar|Avatar]])
|-
!colspan=4|'''Bottom Right'''
|-
|W-tads +800
|W-tads +800
|W-tads +800
|W-tads +800
|-
|}

= Relic Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Medium Rune|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Amusement Park Master|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|VIP Wristband|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Witch's Sugar Jar|green}}

= Robot Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Happy Train|orange|Robot}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Tin Man|orange|Robot}}

= Shell Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Witch's Pot|purple}}

[[Category:Events]]
